name: farmhouse-common
summary: The common room of a working farmhouse — hearth, long bench-table, tools by the door. Muddy boots, a cat in the rafters, the smell of bread.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangular, door on a long wall

primary_palette.note: hearthside meal — table drawn up to the fire, communal bench seating
table-dominant — the whole family eats, prays, and works here
evening quiet — spinning by the fire, table pushed aside

story_prompts: the family is at supper — bench of five, one place empty for the son who is late
harvest evening — table extended, neighbors helping, a cask of ale on the floor
the farm is failing — three good chairs sold, the cupboard mostly empty
the farmer is dead and the room is laid for the funeral feast
a stranger has been fed and now sleeps by the hearth — the family watches from the stairs

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: warm moderate (0.35-0.5) — hearth dominant, one or two tallow candles

anti_patterns: no refinement — no parlor furniture, no display cases, no carpet-royal
show the working life — boots by the door, tools on the wall, flour dust in the air
benches before chairs — farms seat many cheaply
the hearth does everything: cooks, warms, lights. Don't duplicate its function.
